title: Larval Feeding
author: Wen Aw
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.rw7d7hn

steps.title: Both mitotypes were raised on the 1:16 P:C diet
steps.instruction: Both mitotypes were raised on the 1:16 P:C diet

steps.title: Dye labeled food was produced by...
steps.instruction: Dye labeled food was produced by combining 72 ml of food with 8 ml FD&C blue 1 dye (0.5% w/v) while the food was at 60° C

steps.title: 50 second instar larvae from each...
steps.instruction: 50 second instar larvae from each mitotype were placed on the dye labelled food

steps.title: Larvae were allowed to feed for 60 min
steps.instruction: Larvae were allowed to feed for 60 min

steps.title: Larvae with dye visible in their...
steps.instruction: Larvae with dye visible in their gut were collected (48 from each mitotype), homogenized, and absorbance at 630 nm was recorded.
